general.siteNameHint: The name of your platform displayed across the site

email.notificationsHint: Enable or disable all email notifications globally

email.smtpPasswordHint: Your SMTP password or app-specific password
email.fromEmailHint: Email address used as the sender for outgoing emails
email.fromNameHint: Name displayed as the sender in emails

payment.taxRateHint: Default tax rate percentage applied to transactions (0 = no tax)
payment.approvalHint: Require admin approval before processing payments

branding.logoUrlHint: URL of your platform logo (recommended: 200x50px PNG or SVG)
branding.faviconUrlHint: URL of your browser tab icon (recommended: 32x32px ICO or PNG)
branding.primaryColorHint: Main brand color used for buttons, links, and accents
branding.secondaryColorHint: Secondary brand color used for highlights and gradients

enrollment.autoHint: Automatically enroll new users in designated courses
enrollment.selfHint: Allow students to enroll themselves in courses
enrollment.approvalHint: Require admin approval before students can access courses
enrollment.maxHint: Maximum number of courses a user can enroll in (0 = unlimited)
enrollment.expirationHint: Number of days until enrollment expires (0 = never expires)
enrollment.capacityHint: Allow setting maximum student limits for courses

landing.heroTitle:
Master your
Future with
LMS V2
landing.heroSubtitle: The ultimate learning platform for developers
landing.heroDescription: Master the latest technologies with our AI-powered platform. Interactive, fast, and designed for modern learning.
landing.featuresDescription: We've designed LMS V2 to provide you with the best possible educational experience using cutting-edge technology.
landing.feature1Description: Get instant help and deep code reviews powered by state-of-the-art AI models.
landing.feature2Description: Lessons that come to life. Interact with code directly on the platform securely.
landing.feature3Description: Earn points, unlock achievements, and maintain your learning streak with our incentive system.
landing.feature4Description: Validate your skills with digital certificates you can share on your professional profiles.

cta.title: Ready to start your journey?
cta.description: Join thousands of developers who are already improving their skills with LMS V2.

creators.heroTitle: Create, Sell & Scale Your Online Courses with AI
creators.heroSubtitle: The first AI-native platform for course creators. Auto-grade exams, engage students with gamification, and grow your business — no plugins needed.

differentiators.title: Why Creators Choose LMS V2
differentiators.subtitle: Three things that set us apart from every other course platform.

ai.title: AI Auto-Grading
ai.description: AI grades exams and provides personalized feedback automatically. Save hours of manual grading.

gamification.title: Built-in Gamification
gamification.description: XP, levels, streaks, achievements, and a rewards store. Keep students engaged like Duolingo.

modern.title: Modern & Fast
modern.description: Built on Next.js and Supabase. Your school loads instantly, works on any device, and scales automatically.

features.title: Everything You Need to Teach Online
features.subtitle: From content creation to payments, we handle the infrastructure so you can focus on teaching.

editor.title: Rich Content Editor
editor.description: MDX-powered lessons with code blocks, images, embeds, and interactive components. Write once, render beautifully.

exams.title: Exam Builder
exams.description: Multiple choice, open-ended, and true/false questions. AI grades free-text answers with detailed feedback.

exercises.title: Exercise System
exercises.description: Interactive coding challenges with an AI assistant that guides students through problem-solving.

payments.title: Stripe Payments
payments.description: Sell courses individually or via subscription plans. Accept credit cards with zero platform transaction fees.

dashboard.title: Student Dashboard
dashboard.description: Beautiful progress tracking, lesson completions, achievements, and streak counters that motivate students.

analytics.title: Analytics & Insights
analytics.description: Track enrollments, revenue, completion rates, and student engagement from your teacher dashboard.

comparison.title: See How We Compare
comparison.subtitle: We built LMS V2 to give creators more features at a fraction of the cost.
comparison.footnote: * Udemy is free to publish but takes up to 63% revenue share on organic sales.

pricing.title: Plans That Grow With You
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you're ready. No hidden fees, no surprises.

cta.title: Start Building Your Course Today
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of creators who are already earning revenue on LMS V2. Your first course is free.

about.title: Built for learning, by educators
about.description: LMS V2 is a modern learning platform that helps teachers create courses and students learn with clarity. We focus on speed, accessibility, and delightful UX.
about.missionDescription: Make high-quality learning accessible. We build tools that empower teachers and keep students engaged through clear content, progressive feedback, and reliable assessments.
about.feature1: Courses and lessons with MDX support
about.feature3: Teacher tools for building and grading exams

innovation.title: Constant Innovation
innovation.desc: We use the latest technologies to offer a cutting-edge learning experience.

accessibility.title: Universal Accessibility
accessibility.desc: We design so that everyone can learn, regardless of their abilities or location.

quality.title: Educational Quality
quality.desc: We are committed to excellence in every lesson and resource we offer.

coursesCatalog.title: Educational Courses
coursesCatalog.description: Master the latest technologies and advance your career with our premium, expert-led development tutorials and interactive lessons.

emptyState.title: No courses listed yet
emptyState.description: We are currently preparing more educational content for you. Please check back later!

pricing.title: Choose Your Learning Path
pricing.description: Unlock your potential with our flexible pricing plans designed for learners of all levels. Upgrade anytime as your skills grow.

empty.title: New Plans Coming Soon
empty.description: We're currently updating our subscription options to bring you more value. Check back shortly for updated pricing.

payment.benefit2: Automatic payouts to your bank account
payment.benefit4: Track all revenue in your dashboard
payment.revenueSplitNote: You keep 80% of all course sales. The platform fee covers hosting, support, and maintenance.
